CONTENT.Club career: Ramet is a youth product of Étaples, Boulogne and Lille. He started playing with Lille's reserves in 2021 after converting to right-back from winger. he started training with Lille's senior team in the preseason of the 2022-23 season. He made his senior and professional debut with Lille as a late substitute in a 2–0 Ligue 1 win over Toulouse FC on 18 March 2023.
CONTENT.External links: Simon Ramet at SoccerwaySimon Ramet at BDFutbol

SUMMARY: Simon Ramet (born 13 March 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Lille.
